backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing user profile management and invoice CRUD operations with access control, including invoice creation with line items, tax calculation, and status management (draft/finalized).
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting implemented features including invoice preview, PDF download, sharing functionality, dashboard listing, and professional design theme with associated files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend files describing routing, React Query hooks, invoice CRUD pages, preview/download/share components, and styling configuration.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color system defining light and dark mode variables for a professional business-focused design theme using neutral grays.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Billing App with root div and module script loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application with TanStack Router configuration for all invoice routes (dashboard, create, edit, detail, public view) and a profile setup modal for first-time authenticated users.
frontend/src/components/DownloadButton.t: Button component that triggers PDF generation for invoices using the print dialog with loading state and error handling via toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/InvoicePreview.t: Professional invoice preview component displaying formatted invoice details including sender/customer info, line items table, subtotal, tax, and total with currency formatting and status badge.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout component with header, footer, and navigation that handles Internet Identity authentication, displays login/logout button, and provides a 'New Invoice' button for authenticated users.
frontend/src/components/ShareButton.tsx: Button component that copies a public invoice URL to the clipboard and displays a success toast notification with visual feedback.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance with authentication, initializes access control with admin token, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication that manages login state, identity persistence, and provides login/logout functionality with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for user profiles and invoices, including queries for fetching data and mutations for creating, updating, and deleting invoices with automatic cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark theme colors including background, foreground, primary, secondary, muted, accent, destructive, border, and chart colors.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClientProvider for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication context.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Main dashboard page that displays a list of invoices in a table with view, edit, and delete actions, shows a welcome screen for unauthenticated users, and an empty state for users with no invoices.
frontend/src/pages/InvoiceDetailPage.tsx: Invoice detail page that displays a single invoice with InvoicePreview component and provides buttons for navigation back, editing, sharing, and downloading the invoice.
frontend/src/pages/InvoiceFormPage.tsx: Invoice creation/editing form page with customer details, line items management, tax calculation, currency selection, and draft/finalized status handling. Uses React hooks for state management and TanStack Router for navigation.
frontend/src/pages/PublicInvoiceViewPage: Public-facing invoice view page that displays invoice preview and download button. Handles loading and not-found states for invoice retrieval by ID.
frontend/src/types/html2pdf.d.ts: Empty TypeScript declaration file for html2pdf type definitions.
frontend/src/utils/formatters.ts: Utility functions for formatting currency amounts (bigint to decimal with symbols), getting currency symbols for USD/INR/EUR/GBP, and formatting timestamps to readable dates.
frontend/src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts: Generates printable PDF invoices by creating HTML content in a new window with styled invoice layout including header, parties, line items table, and totals.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from query strings or hash-based routing, persisting parameters in sessionStorage, and clearing sensitive parameters from URLs.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, extended theme for sidebar/chart colors, custom animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state tracking document listing existing features (invoice preview, download, share, dashboard, design theme) and pending feature requests (invoice CRUD, multi-currency, backend data model).
